summary: Completed comprehensive testing of refactored backend (server.py 4197→161 lines) and badge/gamification system. Backend tests: 29/29 passed (100%). Fixed MelomaneResponse model bug. Frontend authentication, badges page, and map working correctly.

minor.issue: MelomaneResponse had required fields (country, favorite_venues, etc.) that weren't set for older DB records - FIXED by adding defaults

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'Connexion' in header navigates to role selection page instead of login - user needs to click 'Je suis établissement' then 'Se connecter'
integration_issues.note: Not a bug - this is the intended UX flow

passed_tests: API: GET /api/auth/me - With token returns user data
API: GET /api/badges/all - Returns badges filtered by role
Frontend: Auth page (/auth) - Login form works
Frontend: Badges page (/badges) - Shows stats and badges
Frontend: Map page (/map) - Interactive map loads
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - 17 modules in /routes/ cleanly separated
Badge auto-attribution implemented at 5 key points (events.py, friends.py, venues.py, melomanes.py)
Public badges endpoint /api/badges/user/{user_id} works without authentication
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete and verified. Badge system fully functional with auto-attribution at event participation, friend acceptance, event creation, and venue subscription. MelomaneResponse model fixed to handle older DB records without required fields. 29 API tests passing. Frontend auth flow uses /auth page (not modal). Badges page shows Level, Points, Badges with tier colors.

friend_system.accept: Working with badge check for both users

subscription_system.subscribe: Working with badge check for venue owner

bug_fixed_this_session.issue: MelomaneResponse Pydantic validation error for older DB records missing fields
bug_fixed_this_session.fix: Added default values for country, favorite_venues, notifications_enabled, notification_radius_km, events_attended, favorite_count, favorite_styles
